sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5823" key="a)mfiestri/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφι-εστρίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n5823.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cloak, wrap,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.10</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:61" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.61</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
